zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡，等待突破
zh.content:
当前比特币价格保持在71397.56美元附近，呈现轻微下跌趋势。尽管24小时变化仅为-0.23%，但价格波动依然较为明显，显示出市场的不确定性。短期内，价格可能继续维持在当前区间内震荡整理，等待突破的机会。

从技术指标来看，RSI(14)数据缺失，MACD值为339.66，但未能提供明确的买卖信号。SMA(20)位于70870.06，显示出短期内多头支撑位依然有效。若价格跌破此均线支撑，则可能会出现进一步下探的风险。

支撑位主要集中在71243.1美元附近，若价格跌破此位置，则可能会测试更低的支撑区域。阻力位则位于71687.15美元，若突破此高点，可能会带动短期上涨。投资者应关注这些关键价位，判断是否发生有效突破。

建议保持谨慎，短期内可以考虑观望或在支撑位附近进行低位买入操作，但切勿追高。等待明确的趋势信号再做进一步决策，避免在震荡市中遭受不必要的损失。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin has experienced a slight decline of 0.23% in the last 24 hours, currently trading at 71,397.56 USD. Despite the minor pullback, the overall trend remains bullish in the mid to long term, given the strong upward momentum observed in recent weeks. The market has recently tested a local low of 71,243.10 USD, which could be a potential support level. Should the price fall further, 71,000 USD might act as a critical area for buyers to step in, maintaining upward pressure. 

The lack of a complete RSI reading leaves room for further interpretation, but the existing MACD value of 339.66 indicates a bullish crossover trend, suggesting momentum is still positive. If the MACD line continues to rise, it could signal more buying interest, pushing Bitcoin towards its previous highs. However, with the absence of an updated Signal line, traders should exercise caution and look for confirmation before entering long positions.

From a technical standpoint, the current price is above the 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA), which stands at 70,870.05 USD. This suggests the price is in an uptrend, and the SMA can act as support in the event of a pullback. A breakout above the high of 71,687.15 USD would provide additional confirmation that the bullish trend is intact. Traders should watch for further consolidation near this range before committing to any significant moves.

Considering these factors, it is recommended to closely monitor the price action around key levels. Buying near support at 71,000 USD could be an attractive entry point, while a confirmed breakout above 71,687.15 USD could provide an opportunity to capitalize on the upward trend. On the other hand, a drop below 71,000 USD may suggest a bearish reversal, warranting a more cautious approach.
